name: wooden_chair
prompt: A single solid oak dining chair with a straight backrest, four square legs, and a flat seat, crafted from warm honey-brown wood with visible grain and a smooth satin varnish. Minimal Scandinavian style, sturdy proportions, clean edges, and a clear silhouette suited for 3D reconstruction. Soft highlights define the contours, joints, and wood texture, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: ceramic_mug
prompt: A single cylindrical ceramic mug with a rounded handle and slightly thick rim, made of glazed porcelain in deep cobalt blue with subtle speckled texture and a glossy finish. Clean modern kitchenware style, balanced proportions, smooth curves, and a simple readable silhouette ideal for 3D reconstruction. Crisp reflections emphasize the glaze and rim thickness, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: desk_lamp
prompt: A single adjustable desk lamp with a round metal base, slim articulated arm, and conical shade, finished in matte black powder-coated steel with brushed aluminum joints. Functional industrial style, clear mechanical structure, neat proportions, and a strong silhouette that reads well from every angle for 3D reconstruction. Focused highlights trace the arm hinges and shade edges, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: sedan_car
prompt: A single mid-size sedan car with smooth body panels, four doors, clear windows, silver alloy wheels, and realistic black rubber tires, finished in glossy metallic silver paint. Contemporary automotive design with a clean aerodynamic silhouette, moderate detailing, and well-defined proportions suitable for 3D reconstruction. Controlled reflections reveal the hood, roofline, wheel arches, mirrors, and trim, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: motorcycle
prompt: A single standard street motorcycle with a compact fuel tank, exposed frame, round headlight, black seat, and two thick rubber tires, built from painted metal, brushed steel, and matte plastic. Modern naked-bike style with a strong side silhouette, readable mechanical parts, and moderate complexity for 3D reconstruction. Directional highlights define the tank curves, engine block, handlebars, and wheel rims, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

features.material: painted metal, steel, rubber, and plastic

name: bicycle
prompt: A single city bicycle with a lightweight aluminum frame, straight handlebars, slim saddle, spoke wheels, chain guard, and narrow black tires, finished in matte forest green paint. Practical urban design with clean geometry, balanced proportions, and a crisp recognizable silhouette that remains suitable for 3D reconstruction. Soft reflections outline the frame tubes, rims, pedals, and handlebar grips, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: cat
prompt: A single domestic short-haired cat sitting upright with tail wrapped near the paws, compact body, alert ears, and bright forward-facing eyes. Realistic soft fur with a warm orange tabby coat, subtle cream underbelly, and fine striped texture. Natural animal anatomy, clear silhouette, and controlled pose suitable for 3D reconstruction. Gentle highlights define the fur direction, face, paws, and tail shape, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: dinosaur
prompt: A single Tyrannosaurus rex standing in a stable side-facing pose with a large head, muscular legs, small forearms, and a long balancing tail, covered in textured reptile skin. Realistic prehistoric animal style with earthy olive-green scales, darker ridge markings, and a strong readable silhouette suitable for 3D reconstruction. Focused highlights reveal the jawline, claws, muscles, and scale pattern, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: gazebo
prompt: A single octagonal garden gazebo with a peaked roof, eight slim support columns, open sides, and a raised wooden platform, built from painted timber with subtle grain and clean trim details. Classic pavilion style, symmetrical structure, and a clear architectural silhouette with moderate detail for 3D reconstruction. Even highlights separate the roof edges, columns, railings, and base geometry, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K

name: fountain
prompt: A single three-tier ornamental fountain carved from pale beige stone, featuring a circular basin, stacked bowls, central column, and simple sculpted rims with lightly weathered texture. Traditional European garden style, symmetrical form, and a clean vertical silhouette appropriate for 3D reconstruction. Soft highlights define the stone surface, edges, tier transitions, and basin depth without excessive ornament, studio lighting, white background, photorealistic, 8K
